<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button } from "@/registry/default/ui/button"

  Empty,
  EmptyContent,

  EmptyHeader,
  EmptyMedia,
  EmptyTitle,
} from "@/registry/default/ui/empty"

</script>

  <Empty class="w-full">
    <EmptyHeader>

      <EmptyDescription>
        Please wait while we process your request. Do not refresh the page.
      </EmptyDescription>
    </EmptyHeader>
    <EmptyContent>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
        Cancel
      </Button>
    </EmptyContent>

</template>
